prompts.title: Weekly leadership digest

prompts.snippet: Walk me through this anomaly: timestamp, affected services, blast radius, recommended remediations.

prompts.title: Customer churn root cause

prompts.title: Weekly metric explainer
prompts.snippet: Pick one metric on the analytics dashboard and explain its movement in plain English for non-eng.

prompts.snippet: Summarize active incidents, hot services, and pending escalations for the next on-call shift.

prompts.title: Token budget audit
